items.title: How FDA Approval of TECVAYLI and DARZALEX FASPRO Combo At Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Has Changed Its Investment Story
items.description: In early March 2026, Johnson & Johnson received U.S. FDA approval for TECVAYLI (teclistamab-cqyv) plus DARZALEX FASPRO (daratumumab and hyaluronidase-fihj) to treat adults with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma after at least one prior therapy, based on Phase 3 MajesTEC-3 data showing improved progression-free and overall survival versus standard regimens. This combination introduces an immune-engaging approach that may shift treatment patterns as early as the second line for patients...

items.title: JNJ Gets EU Nod for Expanded Use of Akeega in Prostate Cancer
items.description: J&J gains EU approval to expand Akeega use to treat patients with BRCA-mutated metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer.

items.title: Legend Biotech Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
items.description: Legend Biotech (NASDAQ:LEGN) executives highlighted accelerating global demand for CARVYKTI, improving profitability metrics, and expanding manufacturing capacity during the company’s fourth quarter 2025 earnings call. items.title: FDA Expands Use Of Generic Drug To Treat Autism-Linked Genetic Disorder
items.description: FDA approves expanded use of Wellcovorin tablets to treat cerebral folate deficiency linked to the FOLR1 gene in adults and children.
